title: WinTune Bloat Database Entry
description: A single entry in data/bloat-database.json describing a system item that can be removed or disabled.

id.description: Unique identifier for this entry (kebab-case). Referenced by tweak .ps1 files.

name.description: Name or pattern used to detect the item (e.g. 'king.com.CandyCrushSaga_*', 'DiagTrack').

detect.description: PowerShell command fragment to detect the item. Injected into Scanner.ps1 enumeration.

buildMin.description: Minimum Windows build where this entry exists. 0 = no minimum.

buildMax.description: Maximum Windows build where this entry exists. 0 = no upper limit.

notes.description: Additional context (risk notes, known side effects, alternative names).
